inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $917M minus capital spending $86M divided by 51.2M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Filed owner cash; FY2025 includes Elo acquisition closing Q4 and elevated integration/amortization; Q1 2026 revenue +14% YoY supports base growth path

bear.notes: Leverage limits buybacks; Elo integration drags margins; AVA mix stays low-margin

base.notes: Services/software mix rises; CF organic mid-single digits; Photoneo cross-sell in AVA

bull.notes: Automation + machine vision acceleration; margin recovery post-Elo; sustained repurchases

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill and intangibles reflect Elo/Photoneo purchase accounting; no land/NAV mismatch (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Remaining performance obligation ~$1.17B (10-K FY2025); deferred revenue in services growth path

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Both CF and AVA segments profitable at operating level; AVA margin thin but positive (~$115M OI on $2.4B sales)

option_scan.question: Material separate options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Elo and Photoneo economics embedded in segment revenue paths, not separate terminals

growth_explanation.mechanism: Installed-base refresh cycles on mobile computers and printers; recurring services/software attach; Elo self-service touchscreens and Photoneo 3D vision expand TAM in CF and AVA segments
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 segment MD&A; Q1 2026 10-Q revenue +14% YoY

falsifiers.observation: CF gross margin falls below 45% for two consecutive years post-Elo
Net debt/EBITDA above 3.5x with buybacks paused

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
